name: Python
description: An interpreted, high-level, general-purpose programming language.

name: JavaScript
description: A lightweight, interpreted, object-oriented language with first-class functions.

name: TypeScript
description: A typed superset of JavaScript that compiles to plain JavaScript.

name: Go
description: An open source programming language supported by Google.

name: Java
description: A high-level, class-based, object-oriented programming language.

name: C++
description: A general-purpose programming language created by Bjarne Stroustrup.

name: C#
description: A modern, general-purpose, object-oriented programming language developed by Microsoft.

name: SQL
description: A domain-specific language used in programming and designed for managing data in RDBMS.

name: PostgreSQL
description: A free and open-source relational database management system emphasizing extensibility.

name: MySQL
description: An open-source relational database management system.

name: MongoDB
description: A source-available cross-platform document-oriented database program.

name: Redis
description: An in-memory data structure store used as a distributed, in-memory key-value database.

name: AWS
description: Amazon Web Services, a comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform.

name: GCP
description: Google Cloud Platform, a suite of cloud computing services.

name: Azure
description: Microsoft Azure, a cloud computing service operated by Microsoft.

name: Docker
description: A set of platform as a service products that use OS-level virtualization.

name: Kubernetes
description: An open-source container orchestration system for automating software deployment.

name: Git
description: A distributed version control system that tracks changes in any set of computer files.

name: React
description: A free and open-source front-end JavaScript library for building user interfaces.

name: Angular
description: A TypeScript-based, free and open-source web application framework.

name: Vue.js
description: A model-view-viewmodel front-end JavaScript framework for building user interfaces.

name: Node.js
description: An open-source, cross-platform JavaScript runtime environment.

name: FastAPI
description: A modern, fast web framework for building APIs with Python 3.8+.

name: Django
description: A Python-based free and open-source web framework.

name: PyTorch
description: An open-source machine learning library based on the Torch library.

name: TensorFlow
description: A free and open-source software library for machine learning and artificial intelligence.

name: Pandas
description: A software library written for the Python programming language for data manipulation.

name: NumPy
description: A library for the Python programming language, adding support for large arrays.

name: Machine Learning
description: The scientific study of algorithms and statistical models that computer systems use.

name: Deep Learning
description: A class of machine learning algorithms that uses multiple layers to progressively extract features.

name: NLP
description: A subfield of linguistics, computer science, and artificial intelligence concerned with computer-human languages.

name: REST
description: Representational State Transfer API architectural style.

name: CI/CD
description: Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment automation pipeline.

name: HTML
description: Hypertext Markup Language, standard markup language for documents in web browsers.

name: CSS
description: Cascading Style Sheets, style sheet language for HTML.

name: Tailwind
description: Utility-first CSS framework.
